description: Serialization of the three JSON literals — true, false, null — per §7.12, one per key. Keys are provided in non-canonical input order (t, f, n) so the vector also exercises §7.2 key sorting. Catches implementations that emit title-case (True/False/Null) or upper-case (TRUE/FALSE/NULL) literals, or that drop null-valued keys during serialization.
source: hand-verified against docs/canonicalization.md §7.2, §7.6, §7.12 and RFC 8785 §3.2.3 by Fabio M. S., 2026-04-20
